seo.title: Bike school — Flat Out Days | Vukan's Bike
seo.description: Bike school at Flat Out Days (13–19 July): Basic School for beginners and Advanced School for experienced riders. Tickets and registration on the festival website.

props.headline: Bike school
props.subheadline: Two groups at Flat Out Days: Basic School for your first steps and Advanced School for progress on more demanding trails.

props.heading: Two schools: Basic and Advanced
props.subheading: The programme is split into beginner and advanced levels. Both groups work in small teams (up to 8 participants) with one coach — focus on safe technique, confidence, and progress off-road.

props.heading: Programme by level
props.subheading: Choose the group that matches your skills and goals; both programmes run Tuesday to Friday (or single days), 4 hours per day with a short break.

items.title: Basic School
items.description: For anyone starting mountain biking or wanting more solid fundamentals. Training is step by step, low pressure, with plenty of practice and clear explanations.
bullets: Basics: position, balance, smooth braking, and basic steering
Groups up to 8 participants with one coach
4 h daily + short snack break; minimum age 6
Required protection: helmet, knee pads, and gloves
In bad weather part of the programme moves indoors (setup, basic maintenance, tips)

items.title: Advanced School
items.description: For riders with basics who want to progress on red/black trails, technical sections, and medium table jumps.
bullets: Advanced technique: steep terrain position, precise braking, corner line and line choice
Control and confidence on technical sections and flow features
Groups up to 8 participants with a certified coach
4 h daily + short break; single days possible (Tue–Fri)
In unsafe conditions part moves indoors (advanced setup, maintenance, video analysis)

props.heading: Bike school gallery
props.subheading: Moments from training and the festival.

props.heading: Sign up: Basic and Advanced School
props.subheading: Schedule, packages, and tickets are on the official Flat Out Days website.
